analysis.reasoning: Core message: Celebrates UN's 75th anniversary, asserting that after devastating wars the world—and the EU—chose cooperation over confrontation; portrays the EU as born from dialogue, peace, unity, and as a pillar of multilateralism and staunch supporter of the UN Charter. Evaluation: EU1 (EU is a successful story) — supported; it references roots in overcoming devastating wars, learning from history, and being born from dialogue, peace, unity, which aligns with showcasing successful history and learning from past traumas. EU2 (EU is united) — partially implied via 'unity,' but not about current ability to reach agreements; emphasis is historical/values, not present cohesion, so not clearly promoted. EU3 (useful for citizens) — not addressed. EU4 (avant-garde actor) — not addressed. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) — not explicitly about rights/democracy; focus is multilateralism, so not this. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) — supported; positions the EU as a pillar of multilateralism and supporter of the UN Charter, highlighting its role in global cooperation and peace. Conclusion: Narratives EU1 and EU6 are promoted.
